summary: Add the Goal 2 Agent safety gate before conversational-agent product implementation.
rationale: This governance change intentionally touches CI, ownership, source-boundary checks, and local PR gates so the future conversation-agent package is reviewed as a red-zone Agent surface before Goal 2 product code exists.
line_count_rationale: The Agent safety checker is a new diff gate with focused rules and tests. The existing governance checker and its tests are already oversized and receive only focused red-zone and manifest coverage in this change.
verification: uv run ruff check tools/check_pr_governance.py tests/test_pr_governance.py
uv run ty check tools/check_pr_governance.py tests/test_pr_governance.py
deletion_targets: Agent product code landing without a dedicated tool/session/trace safety gate
risks: The first PR that introduces the new gate needs the governance-bootstrap label so CI can validate the proposed gate when the base branch does not contain it yet.
GitHub external settings still require owner confirmation outside repository files.
